en.name: (Coming soon) 2.0.0
en.content:
Version 2.0.0 will see nutin go fullstack, with the same design philosophy.
This will serve two main purposes:
	• Enable a basic SSR & hydration to improve readability by LLMs
	• Offer a lightweight backend layer
Backend layer will use Fastify and synchronous SQLite. An app can be fullstack, frontend- or backend-only.

Version 2 will also introduce following features and changes:
	• FormGroup, FormControl, Validators.
	• Small component library (~20), focused on accessibility. Will live in src/libs/components, with existing components (anchor, button).
	• Tooltip and dropdown.
	• SCSS utility classes will be removed in version 2, since they are more confusing than useful.
	• Mixins will now live in src/libs/scss/, clearly separating app's code from nutin's code.
	• CLI will be simplified:
		• Main flag: --type fullstack|frontend|backend
		• --options: Options will be passed as a comma-separated string.
	• QoL improvements in components, while staying true to the no-magic motto.
